name: aws-guardduty
description: AWS GuardDuty — threat detection findings (CloudTrail/VPC/DNS log analysis).
title: aws-guardduty

llmHints.on_match: GuardDuty findings query observed. Behavioral/anomaly threat findings captured.

positiveSetup: Invoke cilock with argv starting "aws guardduty"
negativeSetup: Invoke cilock with unrelated argv (e.g. `echo unrelated`)
